name: NekosBest
tagline: Retrieve safe anime images and GIFs
description: Return one to twenty anime images or GIFs from a selected NEKOSBEST category with creator metadata.

auth.hint: No key is required. Supply a truthful application-identifying User-Agent tool parameter.

tools.name: get_category_media
tools.description: Return random media from a supported category.

params.name: category
params.description: Supported image or GIF category such as neko or hug.

params.name: User-Agent
params.description: Unique application name plus contact URL or email, as required by provider policy.
